screening.title: DR Screening Prototype
screening.description: Upload a retinal fundus image for preliminary AI-assisted assessment.
screening.upload_zone: Click or drag images to upload
screening.disclaimer: This is a prototype screening result and should not be used as a final medical diagnosis. Always consult with a qualified ophthalmologist.

about.title: About the Model
about.classes_desc: The model classifies images into five categories based on the presence and severity of lesions.
about.architecture_desc: Custom-tuned CNN utilizing inverted residual blocks and MBConv modules for optimal feature extraction from high-resolution fundus images.

performance.title: Model Performance
performance.analysis_note: Analysis conducted on a validation set of 2,240 standardized fundus images. Performance metrics represent standard cross-validation results.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to access your AI analysis history
auth.register_subtitle: Join NAIC to track your screening history.
auth.verify_email_sent: A verification link has been sent to your email address.
auth.agree_to_terms: I agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy
auth.unverified_error: Please verify your email address before logging in. Check your inbox for the link or

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.reauth_required: Please re-authenticate to change your password

legal.privacy_intro: At NAIC 2026, we are committed to protecting the privacy and security of your medical data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.
legal.privacy_s1_content: We collect account information (email, username) and medical images (retinal fundus scans) that you upload for AI analysis.
legal.privacy_s2_content: The data you provide is used solely for the purpose of demonstrating our AI screening prototype and for computational research. We do not sell your medical data to third parties.
legal.privacy_s3_content: Images are stored securely using Google Cloud Storage. Access is strictly limited to the authenticated user who uploaded the image and authorized research staff.
legal.privacy_s4_content: All data is encrypted in transit using SSL/TLS protocols and at rest using enterprise-grade encryption provided by our cloud infrastructure.
legal.terms_intro: Welcome to the NAIC 2026 Diabetic Retinopathy Screening Prototype. By accessing or using this computational research platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
legal.terms_s1_content: This platform is a prototype developed for computational research and clinical prototyping. It is NOT a diagnostic tool and does NOT provide medical advice.
legal.terms_s2_content: The analysis results provided by our deep learning models are for informational purposes only. They are intended as a preliminary AI-assisted assessment and should always be verified by a qualified ophthalmologist or medical professional.
legal.terms_s3_content: We take your privacy seriously. Your retinal fundus images and account information are stored securely. Please refer to our Privacy Policy for details on data handling and storage.
legal.terms_s4_content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. Any unauthorized use of your account should be reported to NAIC research staff immediately.

history.title: Screening History
history.subtitle: Review your previous AI screenings and manage your medical analysis records.
history.empty_desc: You haven't started any AI screenings yet. Ready to analyze some fundus images?

screening_ui.background_note: Once started, your scans will be processed in the background. You can track their progress in the History page. Navigating away now will cancel unstarted scans.
screening_ui.local_queue_label: This image is currently in your local queue. Click "{start_btn}" to begin the AI analysis and save it to your history.
